values.description: AI Chatbot service base URL. No auth required.
Auto-set when you run 'First Message'. Pass this in all follow-up requests.
Auto-set when you run 'Get Available Demo Slots'. Used in 'Book a Demo'.

info.name: JuriNex AI Chatbot
info.description:
Environment for JuriNex AI Chatbot API.

All variables are auto-populated by test scripts — you don't need to set anything manually.

For production, duplicate this environment and change base_url to the production URL.
